title: Crying Obsidian Expansion
description: Unlock the hidden power of Crying Obsidian! Transform these sorrowful blocks into the toughest ingots and gear available in the game.
body:
# About the Mod

Obsidian is a high-tier utility mod that introduces a specialized smelting process for Crying Obsidian. By utilizing the Blast Furnace, players can now extract a powerful new resource: the Obsidian Ingot.

This mod bridges the gap between end-game materials, providing a rewarding use for one of Minecraft's most unique blocks.

# ✨ Key Features

Advanced Metallurgy: Smelt Crying Obsidian in a Blast Furnace to obtain Crying Obsidian Ingots.

Ultra-Durable Gear: Use these ingots to craft a full suite of weapons, tools, and armor.

Top-Tier Stats: The equipment crafted from Crying Obsidian is among the strongest in the game, offering superior protection and durability compared to standard materials.

Balanced Progression: Requires a Blast Furnace and rare blocks, ensuring it feels like a hard-earned upgrade for your survival world.

# 🛠️ Crafting & Usage

Collect Crying Obsidian.

Place it in a Blast Furnace to melt it down into Ingots.

Use the Crafting Table to forge your new, powerful equipment.
